title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 469.050 - Separate interests, disclaimers or acceptance
text:
469.050.  Separate interests, disclaimers or acceptance. — Each separate interest in property is subject to disclaimer or acceptance and each separate interest, including any specific amount, part, fraction or asset thereof, or formula amount based on present or future facts independent of the disclaimant's volition, is subject to disclaimer or acceptance.
(L. 1997 S.B. 265)
